channel.title: Posts on Vagabond Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Vagabond Notes

item.title: Buffer Overflow
item.description: Everyone and their mother seems to write about buffer overflows at some point. It’s 2024 and I’m super late to the game, it seems buffer overflows become less and less important. Well here’s my write up of buffer overflows based on the old OffSec PEN200 courseware. The point of exploiting a buffer overflow vulnerability is to get control of registers focusing on the ESP, EBP, and EIP registers. As a hacker I can confirm I have control of these registers if the value within them is what I’ve injected.
